subject_tmpl: Large pothole on {STREET} near {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I'm writing to report a serious pothole at the intersection of {STREET} and {CROSS}. It's been there at least {DAYS} days and I saw a cyclist nearly lose control this morning. The hole is probably a foot across and several inches deep. My car took a hard hit last week and I'm worried about damage to my tires. Can Public Works please get out there soon? My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I live at {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for letting us know, {FIRST}. I've forwarded your report to Public Works and asked Director DiMeo to get a crew out to {STREET} within the next few business days. We appreciate residents like you keeping an eye on our streets.

subject_tmpl: Pothole complaint — {STREET} between {CROSS} and {NUM}
body_tmpl: Hi, I wanted to flag a bad stretch of pavement on {STREET} running from about {CROSS} down to the {NUM} block. There are at least three separate potholes, the biggest one right in the lane of travel. I drive this every day on my way to work and it's getting worse. A neighbor said it's been reported before but nothing happened. Can someone look at this soon? — {FIRST}

subject_tmpl: Cracked pavement on {STREET} — safety concern
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo — The pavement on {STREET} near {ADDRESS} has been cracking and heaving for months. It's especially bad after this last winter. My elderly mother visits weekly and she's tripped on the raised edge twice near the curb cut. I know budgets are tight but this really needs attention before someone gets seriously hurt. Please pass this along to whoever handles street repairs. Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for writing, {FIRST}. I'm sorry to hear your mother has had close calls near that section. I've asked our Public Works Director to dispatch a crew to assess {STREET} at {ADDRESS} and prioritize the curb-cut repair. We'll be in touch.

subject_tmpl: Sunken utility cut on {STREET} — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here, {ADDRESS}. There's a sunken utility patch right in front of my house on {STREET} that drops almost two inches below the surrounding asphalt. Every time a truck goes over it the whole block hears a loud bang. This was patched after some work about {DAYS} days ago and has already sunk significantly. Who is responsible for making sure these cuts are properly restored? Can you please fix it or tell me who the contractor was?
reply_tmpl: Mr./Ms. {LAST}, thank you for the report. Our records show Verdi Excavating performed utility work at that location. We have contacted the contractor and required a compliant restoration within 10 business days. If you do not see work begin by {DATE}, please call our office at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Please repave {STREET} — it's overdue
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I've lived on {STREET} for {AGE} years and this street has never been repaved in all that time. The surface is crumbling, the lane markings are completely faded, and every spring the potholes multiply. I've talked to my neighbors and every one of them feels the same way. Is {STREET} on any upcoming capital improvement schedule? We'd love to know when we might expect relief. Thank you for your service to Bellwood. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Faded crosswalk on {STREET} at {CROSS} — kids at risk
body_tmpl: Good morning. The crosswalk at {STREET} and {CROSS} is almost invisible. The paint has worn down to nearly nothing and with school starting back up the kids crossing there in the morning are not being seen by drivers. I've seen cars blow right through without slowing. Can the village please repaint this before the school year gets going? It shouldn't take long and it could save a child's life. Thanks, {FIRST}, {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for the heads-up on the crosswalk at {STREET} and {CROSS}. I've added it to our pavement marking schedule. We aim to complete remarking within {DAYS} days. We'll notify the school crossing guard supervisor as well.

subject_tmpl: Pothole damage to my car — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor, I hit a pothole on {STREET} near {CROSS} on {DATE} and blew out a tire. I had to pay {AMOUNT} for a replacement. I know the village may not cover this, but I wanted it on record and I want to know if the village will fix the hole before it damages more vehicles. I have photos if needed. My contact is {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you for reporting this. Public Works has been notified and will repair the pothole on {STREET} at {CROSS} promptly. For vehicle damage claims, please contact the Village Clerk's office — they can provide you with the appropriate claim form.

subject_tmpl: Multiple potholes reported — {STREET} near {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hi Director DiMeo — I'm counting at least {NUM} potholes between {ADDRESS} and the corner of {CROSS} on {STREET}. Some are pretty shallow but two of them are deep enough that they jolt the whole car. I filled out a 311 request a while back and nothing has happened. I'm hoping this direct email gets more traction. Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Winter road conditions on {STREET} — potholes everywhere
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — every winter {STREET} turns into a minefield. The potholes that open up after the snow melts are worse than ever this year. I have driven this road for {AGE} years and I have never seen it this bad. I understand the freeze-thaw cycle is hard on pavement, but it seems like there is no proactive plan here. When will the village do a thorough repair pass on {STREET}? My address is {ADDRESS} if you need it. {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Alley off {STREET} has serious surface damage
body_tmpl: Hello, the alley behind {ADDRESS} off {STREET} is in terrible shape. There are deep ruts, broken concrete slabs that have shifted, and a low spot that pools water every rain. Garbage trucks have a hard time getting through. I'm not sure if this is a village alley or county, but I hope you can check. If it's not yours, could you point me to who I should contact? Thanks, {FIRST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, we checked and that alley is maintained by the Village. I've added it to our repair queue. Current lead time is approximately {DAYS} days. We appreciate your patience.

subject_tmpl: Faded lane markings on {STREET} causing confusion
body_tmpl: Hi Mayor, the lane lines on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {NUM} have faded so badly that drivers are unsure where to drive. I've seen near-misses as people drift trying to figure out where lanes are, especially at night. The turn arrow at {CROSS} is also completely gone. This is a safety issue. Can we get the lane markings repainted soon? Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Pavement condition assessment — {STREET} corridor
body_tmpl: Frank, I completed the field review of {STREET} from {CROSS} to {NUM} yesterday. Overall PCI is in the low 40s — below our threshold for routine maintenance. I'm recommending we move this segment to the mill-and-overlay list for {DATE}. I've attached the assessment with GPS-referenced defect photos. Let me know if you want to walk the corridor together before I finalize the grant application language. — Tom
reply_tmpl: Tom, thanks for the quick turnaround. Let's schedule the walkthrough for {DATE} at {TIME}. I'll bring the crew supervisor. If the PCI confirms your numbers we can move it into the next capital budget cycle.

subject_tmpl: Resident complaints — {STREET} pothole cluster
body_tmpl: Tom, we've received {NUM} complaints in the last {DAYS} days about a pothole cluster on {STREET} near {CROSS}. I've dispatched a patching crew for a temporary cold-mix fix this week, but I think this area needs to go on the permanent repair list. Can you pull the pavement history for that block and let me know if it's under any existing warranty? Thanks, Frank.

subject_tmpl: FWD: Constituent complaint re potholes — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Frank, forwarding a resident complaint that came into the Mayor's inbox about {STREET} near {ADDRESS}. Resident {FIRST} {LAST} says there are {NUM} potholes and the road is getting worse. Mayor Okonkwo would like a status update so we can close the loop with the resident by {DATE}. Thanks, Tina.
reply_tmpl: Tina, we have that block on the schedule for this week. Cold-mix patch going down Thursday, permanent repair slated for the next hot-mix cycle in {DATE}. I'll send you a short update to relay to the resident.

subject_tmpl: CDBG street resurfacing grant — {STREET} eligible block
body_tmpl: Karen, I wanted to flag that the {STREET} block between {CROSS} and {NUM} qualifies for CDBG public infrastructure funding based on census tract data. Pavement condition is poor and resident complaints are mounting. If we apply by {DATE} we could secure roughly {AMOUNT} toward a full mill and overlay. I'd like authorization to spend a few hours developing the application. — Tom Reyes, P.E.
reply_tmpl: Tom, go ahead and develop the application. Loop in Finance so David can confirm the match requirement. Nice catch on the eligibility.

subject_tmpl: Pothole opened up after water main work — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hello Director DiMeo. After the water main repair that happened on {STREET} around {DATE}, there's now a pothole right where the crew filled in the trench. It's been {DAYS} days and the patch is already breaking apart and sinking. Who is responsible for this — the contractor or the village? Either way it needs to be fixed. My car has already taken a beating. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Road condition in front of {BIZ} — customer complaints
body_tmpl: Director DiMeo, I'm the manager at {BIZ} located at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. We've had multiple customers mention the rough pavement directly in front of our entrance, and one told us she bent a wheel on the pothole at the curb cut. It's affecting our business — people are choosing to park elsewhere and walk around. Can the village please repair the pavement between {CROSS} and our driveway? We'd appreciate it. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for reaching out. We have logged the complaint and a crew will assess the area at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} by {DATE}. We'll let you know what we find.

subject_tmpl: St. Charles Rd pavement — impact on Bellwood businesses
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, on behalf of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}, I want to raise a concern shared by several business owners along St. Charles Rd. The pavement between {CROSS} and {NUM} has deteriorated badly — potholes, cracked curbs, broken gutter line. Customers notice it and it reflects poorly on the commercial corridor. Is there a timeline for improvement? We'd like to see this prioritized. {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Pothole on {STREET} — second request
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, this is my second time emailing about the pothole on {STREET} near {ADDRESS}. I reported it {DAYS} days ago and got a nice response from your office, but it still has not been repaired. In the meantime it has grown larger and I almost popped a tire again yesterday. Can someone please follow up? I don't want to be a pest but this is a real hazard. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, I sincerely apologize for the delay. I've personally escalated this to Director DiMeo and asked for the repair to be completed no later than {DATE}. Thank you for your patience and for following up.

subject_tmpl: Raised manhole cover on {STREET} — jarring ride
body_tmpl: Hi, there's a manhole cover on {STREET} near {CROSS} that sits about two inches above the pavement. Every single vehicle going over it makes a loud bang. This has been going on for months. I don't know if the cover was adjusted improperly or if the pavement sank around it, but it needs to be leveled. My address is {ADDRESS}. Thanks, {FIRST}.

subject_tmpl: Request to repave {STREET} — petition from {NUM} residents
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I am submitting this email on behalf of {NUM} residents of {STREET} who have signed a petition asking the village to repave our street from {CROSS} to {NUM}. The pavement is in very poor condition with deep cracks, standing water pooling in ruts, and several potholes that appear every winter. We ask that {STREET} be considered in the next round of capital improvements. I am happy to deliver the physical petition signatures to Village Hall. Respectfully, {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you for organizing your neighbors and bringing this forward formally. I am asking Village Engineer Tom Reyes to conduct a pavement condition survey of {STREET} and include his findings in our next CIP presentation to the Village Board. We will keep you informed.

subject_tmpl: Deep pothole on {STREET} — possible suspension damage
body_tmpl: I hit a very deep pothole on {STREET} near {CROSS} coming home late on {DATE}. My car was pulled to one side immediately and I had to have my alignment checked the next day. The mechanic said it may have bent a tie rod. This cost me {AMOUNT}. The hole is easy to spot — it's right in the middle of the westbound lane at {CROSS}. Please fix this so no one else goes through what I did. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Thank you — {STREET} pothole fixed!
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I just want to say thank you! The pothole I reported on {STREET} near {ADDRESS} was repaired quickly after I contacted your office. The crew did a good job and it's smooth again. I know public works gets a lot of complaints so I wanted to make sure they also get some credit when things go right. Thank you and your team. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you so much for the kind note, {FIRST}. I'll be sure to pass your appreciation along to the Public Works crew. This is exactly why we're here!

subject_tmpl: Speed bump on {STREET} damaged — vehicles bottoming out
body_tmpl: Good afternoon. The speed bump on {STREET} near {ADDRESS} has separated from the pavement and is rocking when cars hit it. One side is sticking up noticeably. I've seen a few cars bottom out on it, especially lower vehicles. At night it's invisible and dangerous. Is this something Public Works repairs? Please let me know. {FIRST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Pavement heaving on {STREET} — tree roots or freeze?
body_tmpl: Mayor, there is a section of {STREET} near {CROSS} where the pavement is heaving up in waves. It looks like either tree roots or frost heave has pushed the asphalt up. It's been like this for at least {DAYS} days and I think it's getting worse. A friend said she scraped her exhaust pipe going over it. Is this something Public Works can fix or does it require the engineer to look at it first? Either way, please get someone out there. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Coordination needed — Mannheim Rd paving near {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Hello, this is {FIRST} {LAST} from IDOT District 1. We are planning a mill-and-overlay project on Mannheim Rd between {CROSS} and {NUM} scheduled to begin {DATE}. I wanted to reach out early so the Village of Bellwood can coordinate any utility or curb work it wants to accomplish before we lay new pavement. Please contact me at {PHONE} or reply here. We'd also like to discuss detour signage if the Village has preferences.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for reaching out. We do have a few items — a catch basin adjustment at {CROSS} and a water valve raise at {NUM}. Let's schedule a pre-con call for the week of {DATE}. I'll bring our Public Works Director. — Tom Reyes, P.E., Village Engineer.

subject_tmpl: Crumbling curb and gutter on {STREET} near {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hi Director DiMeo. The curb and gutter along {STREET} near {ADDRESS} are completely broken apart. Chunks of concrete are loose in the street and water is eroding under the pavement edge. I've tripped on the broken curb face twice. I know it's not exactly a pothole but the whole edge of the road is failing. Can you please add it to a repair list? {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Road damage from heavy trucks on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I live on {STREET} near {CROSS} and over the past {DAYS} days there has been heavy truck traffic from what I think is construction at {ADDRESS}. The road surface is now breaking up — ruts forming in the asphalt and the edge is cracking off. Is there anything the village can do to enforce weight limits or require the contractor to repair the damage they are causing? This is a residential street and it cannot handle these trucks. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you for bringing this to our attention. I've asked our code officer and Village Engineer to investigate the truck traffic on {STREET} and determine whether a weight-limit violation or road-damage bond applies. We'll follow up with you at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Pothole at {STREET} and {CROSS} — nearly lost control
body_tmpl: I need to report a dangerous pothole at the corner of {STREET} and {CROSS}. I hit it while making a turn on {DATE} and nearly lost control of my vehicle. The hole is in the worst spot — right where you turn from {CROSS} onto {STREET}. Please send someone out immediately. I am worried about motorcycles especially. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: We received your report and a crew has been dispatched to {STREET} and {CROSS}. We expect the repair to be completed by end of day {DATE}. Thank you for reporting this.

subject_tmpl: Ambulance bottomed out on {STREET} — please fix
body_tmpl: Mayor, I witnessed an ambulance hit a large pothole on {STREET} near {CROSS} so hard that it bounced visibly. I am deeply concerned about what that does to a patient being transported. This is an emergency vehicle route and the road condition is unacceptable. Please treat this as a priority. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, this is exactly the kind of report we need to hear. I've marked this as an emergency priority and asked Public Works to repair the pothole on {STREET} at {CROSS} immediately. I'm also notifying our Fire Shift Commander. Thank you.

subject_tmpl: Hazardous road condition — {STREET} at {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Frank, officers on patrol flagged a hazardous pothole at {STREET} and {CROSS} last night. It's in the travel lane and caused at least one vehicle to swerve. PD has placed cones as a temporary measure but we need this patched ASAP — possibly tonight if you have an on-call crew. Can you advise? — Reggie Banks
reply_tmpl: Reggie, we'll get someone out there within two hours. If the hole is as described, we'll do an emergency cold-mix patch tonight and come back with hot mix as soon as weather permits. Thanks for the heads-up.

subject_tmpl: Sink hole developing on {STREET} — looks serious
body_tmpl: Hello, I want to flag something that looks more serious than a regular pothole. Near {ADDRESS} on {STREET}, the pavement has dropped about four inches in roughly a three-foot circle. The edges are cracking in a ring pattern, which I've read can indicate a void underneath. This is near the curb lane. Can an engineer look at this before it collapses? I'm worried about it. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the detailed description. We've escalated this to our Village Engineer. A crew will be on site by {TIME} to assess and barricade the area if needed. Please do not drive over it. We appreciate you reporting it.

subject_tmpl: Pothole on {STREET} — older resident concerns
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I am {AGE} years old and I drive carefully, but the pothole on {STREET} near {CROSS} gave me quite a scare last week. I drive a small car and the jolt felt like it could have caused an accident. I also worry about my neighbors who are my age. Could the village please repair this? I pay my taxes and I expect safe roads. Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Cracked asphalt on {STREET} — water pooling in cracks
body_tmpl: Hi there. The asphalt on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {NUM} has wide cracks running across the full width of the lane. After rain, water sits in the cracks and on {DATE} I watched it freeze overnight and the cracks seemed to widen by morning. It's going to keep getting worse through winter. Is there a crack-filling program the village uses? Just looking for some preventive treatment before the whole section fails. {FIRST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Frustrated with road repairs on {STREET} — no follow-through
body_tmpl: Mayor, I have complained about the potholes on {STREET} at least {NUM} times over the past year. Each time I get a polite email saying it will be addressed. Each time nothing happens. I pay {AMOUNT} in property taxes. I deserve a road I can drive on. I am not asking for luxury — just basic maintenance. If the village cannot fix {STREET}, please tell me why, because right now I feel completely ignored. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, your frustration is completely valid and I am sorry we have let you down. I will personally call you at {PHONE} this week to discuss what has happened and what we will do to make it right. Please hold me accountable. — Mayor Okonkwo

subject_tmpl: Motor Fuel Tax funds — {STREET} resurfacing project
body_tmpl: Tom, I've confirmed we have {AMOUNT} remaining in MFT funds for this fiscal year. If the {STREET} resurfacing project comes in under that figure, we can fully fund it from MFT without a budget amendment. I'd need your cost estimate by {DATE} to get the IL DOT paperwork filed in time. Let me know if you want to set up a quick call. — David Okafor, Finance Director.
reply_tmpl: David, my estimate for {STREET} mill-and-overlay is {AMOUNT}. I'll have the detailed breakdown to you by {DATE}. That should clear the MFT threshold with some to spare.

subject_tmpl: Wheelchair accessible route blocked — crumbled pavement at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hello, I use a power wheelchair and I rely on the sidewalk and street surface near my home at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. The curb cut at {CROSS} is crumbling and there's a pothole right in the accessible path that I cannot safely navigate. I've had to go out into traffic to get around it. This is an ADA accessibility issue and I would like it addressed urgently. Please contact me at {PHONE}. {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you for bringing this forward. Accessible-route barriers are a priority for us. I've scheduled a crew to assess and repair the curb cut at {STREET} and {CROSS} within {DAYS} days. I will call you personally at {PHONE} to confirm once complete.

subject_tmpl: School route on {STREET} — potholes need urgent fix
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, my children walk to school along {STREET} and the stretch from {CROSS} to {NUM} is very rough. Kids are stepping into potholes they can't see when it's dark in the morning, and the faded crosswalk at {CROSS} is nearly invisible. Can your office flag this for priority treatment? School starts early and these kids need a safe path. I'm happy to walk the route with anyone from Public Works. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Spring thaw potholes on {STREET} — reporting {NUM} locations
body_tmpl: Hi Director DiMeo, now that the snow is gone I can see a new batch of potholes on {STREET}. I walked the block and noted {NUM} distinct holes. The worst ones are at roughly {ADDRESS} and at the {CROSS} intersection. I know spring is busy for your crew but I wanted to give you a heads-up with as much detail as possible so you can plan. Happy to send photos. {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for the thorough report — photos would definitely help. Send them to this email and we'll get them into our work order system. Spring patching season is underway and {STREET} is now on the list.

subject_tmpl: Bellwood road conditions — Cook County infrastructure survey
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, Cook County is conducting an infrastructure needs survey for municipalities in Proviso Township. We would like to include Bellwood's road resurfacing priorities in our joint application for federal transportation funding. Could your Village Engineer provide a prioritized list of street segments needing resurfacing, along with current pavement condition data, by {DATE}? Please direct questions to {FIRST} {LAST} at the County at {PHONE}. Thank you.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for including Bellwood. I'll ask our Village Engineer Tom Reyes to prepare the requested data and submit it by {DATE}. We have several priority corridors we'd like to see in any joint application.

subject_tmpl: Pavement edge drop-off on {STREET} — tire danger
body_tmpl: Hello. The edge of the pavement on {STREET} near {CROSS} has eroded and there's now a 3–4 inch drop-off from the road surface to the gravel shoulder. When I drift toward the edge, my tire drops off and it's hard to steer back. This is especially dangerous on that curve. Can the village fill in the edge or mark it? Even a warning sign would help for now. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Question about capital improvement plan — {STREET} repaving
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I've heard the village has a capital improvement plan that includes street resurfacing. Is {STREET} between {CROSS} and {NUM} on any upcoming list? My block is in terrible shape and I want to know if we are being considered or if we should formally request to be included. We've had complaints going back years. Is there a public document I can review? Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, the CIP is discussed at our annual budget workshops, which are open to the public. I've asked Village Engineer Tom Reyes to look at whether {STREET} qualifies for inclusion in the next cycle. We'll be in touch with more detail.

subject_tmpl: Utility cut on {STREET} — failed restoration after gas work
body_tmpl: Hi. I'm calling attention to a poorly restored utility cut on {STREET} near {ADDRESS}. The gas company came through about {DAYS} days ago and the patch they put down is already failing. It's cracking at the edges and the center has dropped about an inch and a half below the surrounding pavement. Doesn't the village inspect these restorations? Who do I contact to get this fixed properly? {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Mr./Ms. {LAST}, yes — we do require a final inspection of utility cuts within {DAYS} days of completion. This restoration did not pass our standard. We are contacting the utility company to require a compliant repair. You should see work begin within the next week.

subject_tmpl: Washboard surface on {STREET} — vibration damaging my home?
body_tmpl: Mayor, the pavement on {STREET} has developed a washboard pattern — a series of small ridges every foot or so — that creates constant vibration when you drive over it. My house at {ADDRESS} is right on {STREET} and I swear I can feel the vibration inside when heavy vehicles pass. I'm worried about what this is doing to my foundation. Is there any chance the road can be milled and smoothed out? {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Emergency road repair — {STREET} at {CROSS}, budget impact
body_tmpl: Karen, we have a road condition on {STREET} at {CROSS} that requires emergency repair. An officer placed cones last night after a driver swerved. I can get a crew there today but it will require a budget transfer of approximately {AMOUNT} from contingency to the street maintenance line. Please confirm authorization so I can proceed. Frank DiMeo, Public Works.
reply_tmpl: Authorized, Frank — proceed with the emergency repair. Submit the transfer paperwork to Finance by {DATE} and copy me. Safety comes first.
